rulings.Case Title: 75 HOWARD OWNER, LP VS. KBSIII 201 SPEAR STREET, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 13, 2025 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT BUCK DEVELOPMENT HOWARD, LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is OFF CALENDAR. This motion is untimely. Pursuant to the Notice of Motion it is exclusively based on the statutory provisions of the Code of Civil Procedure. Per CCP 438(e) no such motion may be brought within 30 days of trial "unless the court otherwise permits." Moving party filed to point to any part of the record reflecting the Court's permission. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: MAROC PAINTING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. ANAND GOHEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Plaintiff'S Mechanics Lien
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 13, 2025 line 2. DEFENDANT ANAND GOHEL ALSO KNOWN AS RAMAN GOHEL, AN INDIVIDUAL, CRISSIUS PROPERTIES, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED, 3866 CLAY LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Plaintiff'S Mechanics Lien is GRANTED. Mechanic's lien is expunged. Plaintiff failed to carry their burden and cited no cases for the proposition that CC 8412 requirements have been met. Defendant's request for attorney's fees is denied. Defendant fails to cite any cases for the proposition that CC 8488 applies under the facts of this case. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.
